product.name: ArBo Knit
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra fire resistant, world's strongest synthetic fabrics from Pbo (polyphenylene benzobisoxazole)
product.titleDescriptor: 58% para Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon knit fabric, 220 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 250 g/m², 58% p-Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Pique Fabric
descriptions: World's strongest systhetic fabric which contains Pbo (poly phenylene benzobisoxazole)
250 g/m², 58% p-Aramid, 40% Pbo, 2% Carbon. ArBo Knit is designed for firefighters's inner t-shirt.
ArBo Knit is ultra fire resistant fabric
Flame resistant (Flame retardant) fabric with EN 11612 certification.
ArBo Knit is the best fabric in all categories as t-shirt turnout gear.
58% para Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon knit fabric, 220 gr/m'2
250 g/m², 58% p-Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Pique Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 58% p-Aramid (p-AR) 40% PBO (Pbo) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: ArBo Knit is designed for firefighters's inner t-shirt.
Application image label: Pbo Knit firefighter t-shirt
matches.rationale: Product data explicitly and repeatedly states this fabric is designed and applied as firefighter t-shirt material, with direct firefighter-specific certification (EN ISO 11612) and application labeling.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Ultra-high-strength FR fabric could theoretically suit tactical/uniformed use, but no explicit military or police application is stated.
Antistatic property (EN 1149-5) is present but no explicit electrical/energy sector use is stated, per exclusion rule.
